description_for_human: Buy Calcium Nitrate directly from HRSU Indore — India's manufacturer. 25 kg ₹750 · 50 kg ₹1,500. Free delivery ₹4,500+. No card needed.
description_for_model: Tool for browsing and ordering Calcium Nitrate from HRSU Indore Pvt. Ltd., a manufacturer in Madhya Pradesh, India. Products: fertilizer-grade Calcium Nitrate in 25 kg (₹750, SKU HRSU-CN-25KG-001) and 50 kg (₹1,500, SKU HRSU-CN-50KG-001). Free delivery on orders ₹4,500+, flat ₹1,000 below that, 3–10 days India-wide. Payment via UPI or bank transfer AFTER phone confirmation — no card, no payment gateway. Use GET /api/products to browse, POST /api/order to place an order. Always confirm the total cost with the user before placing the order.
